title: Earnings Call Transcript: Lucid Group Q4 2024 Beats Revenue Forecast, Stock Surges
text: Lucid Group Q4 2024 revenue was $234.5 million, beating forecast of $200.5 million by 17%. Full year 2024 production was 9,029 vehicles. Full year 2024 deliveries were 10,241 vehicles, a 71% year-over-year increase. Q4 deliveries were 3,099 vehicles, a 79% year-over-year increase. Q4 EPS was a loss of $0.22, better than forecasted loss of $0.25. GAAP gross margin for 2024 was -114% versus -225% in 2023. Q4 GAAP gross margin was -89%. Cash and equivalents were $5.08 billion. Total liquidity was $6.13 billion with strong short-term stability evidenced by 3.71 current ratio. Q4 production was 3,386 vehicles, up 42% year-over-year and 88% sequentially. Lucid Air was the number one best-selling EV in its segment during the second half of 2024 and the third best-selling vehicle when including gas-powered vehicles in its segment. Lucid Gravity orders exceeded expectations with over 75% of orders from new customers. The majority of Gravity orders were configured above $120,000. Midsize platform production was scheduled for late 2026. For 2025, production target was 20,000 vehicles, doubling 2024 output. Capital expenditures were approximately $1.4 billion. Continued gross margin improvement was expected. Stock surged 9.58% in aftermarket trading to $2.86 following earnings announcement.
